metaDescription: Need a report? Write comprehensive research on any topic. Includes problem statement, literature review, and methods. Try it now.

faq.q: Can I trust the data in AI-written research reports?
faq.a: In the literature review, the AI fabricates papers and authors. Verify every citation on Google Scholar or Web of Science. Data tables and interview conclusions are especially prone to invention. Treat AI output as a structural template and fill in data yourself.

faq.q: Can it adjust to different types (market / academic / policy)?
faq.a: Yes, before the topic specify: "market research for investors," "academic research for master's thesis," or "policy research submitted to a government body." Structure, diction, and length differ significantly by type. Being clear upfront avoids rework.
